title: Stelis killipii
taxonomy: Stelis killipii is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This species belongs to the genus Stelis, which is a group of small to medium-sized orchids. The genus Stelis is part of the subtribe Pleurothallidinae, a subcategory within the orchid family. Stelis killipii is native to Central and South America, where it grows in humid environments. The exact classification of Stelis killipii at the species level is still valid, with no known synonyms or reclassifications.
